business_definition: Represents a digital or physical insurance-related document.
Unique identifier assigned to the document.
Represents descriptive metadata associated with a document.
Represents AI/manual classification of a document.
Represents text extracted from document images.
Represents validation performed on uploaded documents.
Represents business relationships between documents and insurance entities.
Business entity type associated with the document.
Identifier of the linked business entity.
Indicates whether this is the primary document for the business entity.
Number of business entities referencing the document.
Represents version history of the document.
Unique identifier assigned to document version.
Reason for creating a new version.
Indicates whether this is the latest version.
Represents storage metadata associated with the document.
Represents operational lifecycle of the document.
Represents AI-generated assessment of document quality and usefulness.
AI recommendation for improving document quality.

example: Policy certificate extracted successfully with verified customer and vehicle details.
